entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, an organization that conducted a research priority-setting exercise

entities.name: RESEARCH PRIORITY SETTING
entities.description: An objective and transparent process used to determine research focus and resource allocation

entities.name: MEDIUM TERM PLAN
entities.description: A strategic plan for the period 1994-1998 developed by ICRISAT

entities.name: CGIAR
entities.description: Consultative Group on International Agricultural Research, a global partnership for agricultural research

entities.name: RESOURCE ALLOCATION PROCESS
entities.description: The process of distributing funds and resources based on established research priorities

entities.name: SENSITIVITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: A technique used to evaluate the impact of different criteria on research priority setting

entities.name: MEASURABLE CRITERIA
entities.description: Quantifiable standards used to evaluate and set research priorities
